source: Bloons Wiki — representative sample (Module 3 of AI/BTD6 plan)

rounds.summary: First Pinks. Pinks are fast — make sure you have something with reach.
First Lead bloons in a fast wave. Need sharp-piercing damage or explosive.
First Ceramic rush. Need consistent ceramic damage.
First BAD-class threat in Standard Easy ending — first BFB on Medium/Hard. Bring serious DPS.
Long Ceramic-Lead wave with Camo Lead mixed in. Pierce-heavy ceramic answers AND camo detection both required.
Two BADs back-to-back. Need at least one tower or hero capable of high DPS to BAD-class bloons.
Lots of DDTs in waves. Camo lead detection essential; sharp/shatter damage helpful.
BAD + heavy support. The hardest standard freeplay round most players reach.
